intro: The workshop combines lectures, live demonstrations and hands-on activities to provide both conceptual understanding and practical experience.

sessions.title: Introduction to Earth Observation Data
sessions.description: How EO data is captured, what information it stores and how it can be used

sessions.title: Introduction to Data Cubes
sessions.description: Concepts, architecture & how they enable scalable EO analysis

sessions.title: Presentation: About iDEAS Lab and its works
Cloud Native Geospatial & File Formats
sessions.description: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG), STAC, Zarr & why they matter

sessions.title: Live Demo, Hands-on: QGIS Plugin & Web UI
sessions.description: Hands-on walkthrough of the VirtuGhan QGIS plugin and web UI for cloud native EO data

sessions.title: Pizza by the River (Optional Social)
sessions.description: Meetup at Lievitamente Pizzeria, Elisabethstraße 21a, 5020 Salzburg. Grab pizza together and walk along the Salzach river.

sessions.title: Analysis in Python with Cloud Native EO Data
sessions.description: Hands on session on real-world areas using Python & COGs

sessions.title: Team Project: Deriving Insights from Data Cubes
sessions.description: Teams tackle real EO challenges and extract meaningful results

sessions.title: Team Presentations & Discussion
sessions.description: Each team showcases findings and analysis outcomes
